//: Compiler SETTINGS for any host-side halves (server/, worker/, mcp/, hooks/). Mirrors the host's backend tsconfig: lib ES2022 + DOM (the vendored contract carries `/// <reference lib="dom" />`), node types, strict. Canvas ships only a ui/ capability today, so this is the scaffold for host-side code if added later; the ui/ half has its own ui/tsconfig.json. This file does NOT typecheck directly — source imports `../../types`, a path that in a flat standalone repo points above the repo root (in production the extension is nested one dir deeper). `npm run verify` reproduces the production nesting in a temp mirror and runs tsc from there. See README → 'How types resolve'.
